name: Template - Monitor GHL Updates - API & Breaking Changes

parameters.content:
## Monitor GHL Updates - API & Breaking Changes

Runs every Monday at 9 AM.

**Flow:** Schedule -> GHL Changelog RSS -> Filter by keywords -> Teams notification

**Setup:**
1. Set `TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL` environment variable in n8n
2. Activate the workflow
3. First run will set the baseline date

**Keywords monitored:** breaking, deprecated, removed, api, webhook, oauth, scope, migration, sunset, v2, workflow, custom field, pipeline
